quoteText: He's being polite. The real question is why every 401k provider pushes you into stocks and bonds but makes it damn near impossible to hold the one asset central banks are actually buying.
He's buying the dip while your 401k is still buying the hype. When was the last time your plan administrator even mentioned Bitcoin as an option? They'd rather keep you in their fee-heavy funds.
What he's not telling you is that your 401(k) provider makes zero commission on physical silver. Funny how they never mention that when pushing their managed funds.
Bitcoin bros said crypto was digital gold. Turns out actual gold doesn't crash 4% every time someone sneezes. Your 401k probably owns more Tesla than precious metals.
He's being polite. The real question is why every central bank on earth is stacking precious metals while your 401k provider steers you toward paper assets. Almost like they know something you don't.
He's being polite. The real question is why every 401k provider pushes Bitcoin ETFs but makes you jump through hoops to own actual gold.
He's being polite. Your 401(k) is stuffed with paper promises from the same people who printed 40% of all dollars in existence since 2020. But sure, keep trusting that retirement statement.
